_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Wax xarit, bu dem dëkk.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan dañu ko feri ngir mënees woon ci këlëfum kaw. Këlëfu bu nekk am nanu jëf bu yëgël ci tayre.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Listu kañ yi ak dewe Marks di soxor xam-xam. Marks di tokeniyu dëkku, mënees nekk xëmu.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Tayre Liana Banyan ci {{language}}. Seet {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Siy ci yoonu ak kiiray njot-buukam
speakFriend.claimBounty: Jëfe Jëfandikoo bi ci Tayre bi
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Xobalu Dekkanteeku: Lu tax Bataaxal yi
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Kaw yëp ci réew bi dem nekk ci xam-xam yi. Mbuur mburu 26 bi siy.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Lu tax Jëfandikoo ci Tayre Dox
speakFriend.step1Body: Yëkkati Jëfandikoo ci Tayre ci Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Tayre kaw string yi. Yonn ci Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Bi dem nanu, nga xam Marks ak di ñëw ci IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Wax jaaraama, dem ci biir."

languageSwitcher.tip: Jëfe bataaxal kañ ci yooyu Dëkk Durin ngir yëgël xam xam bu am solo!
